name: Cheese Ravioli
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Condensed Cheddar Cheese Soup, 11 Oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ravioli as directed on package.
2. Heat soup and milk just to boiling in a 2-quart saucepan, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in mozzarella cheese and Italian seasoning.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until cheese is melted.
5. Drain ravioli; place in an ungreased 2-quart casserole or heatproof serving dish.
6. Pour cheese mixture over ravioli.
7. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
